positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement of luminous tropical fauna and flora. Focus on bioluminescent hummingbirds nestled among oversized, dew-covered monstera leaves and delicate jungle vines. Incorporate subtle celestial elements, such as crescent moons and nebula swirls, woven into the patterns of the leaves. The style should be highly detailed, modern illustrative, combining elements of Art Nouveau and scientific botanical sketches. Use a vibrant, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep indigo, emerald green, turquoise, and glowing gold highlights. Composition must be perfectly centered and ideal for repeating pattern tiling, ensuring clean, strong silhouettes against a slightly distressed, aged parchment background. Perfect symmetry, crisp linework, cinematic depth of field, studio lighting.
negative: blurry, low detail, messy, text, watermark, logo, symbol, artifact, deformed, poor anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, noise, grainy, cartoonish, realistic photo, bad composition
